mapper.insert: INSERT INTO certificate_template (name, background_url, style, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{backgroundUrl}, #{style}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, background_url, style, status, create_time FROM certificate_template WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, background_url, style, status, create_time FROM certificate_template ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, name, background_url, style, status, create_time FROM certificate_template WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
